title: neogaillonia puberula
intro: Neogaillonia puberula, also known as Gaillonia puberula, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae, a group of flowering plants commonly known as the coffee or madder family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Neogaillonia puberula include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to treat digestive issues. Neogaillonia puberula can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
